prompt: Create a Python function that reverses a string

requirements: Input string must be a valid Python string
execution_steps: Define a function named reverse_string that takes one argument (the input string)
Inside the function, use slicing to extract the characters of the input string in reverse order

implementation.description: A Python function that reverses a string using slicing.
completed_steps: Define a function named reverse_string that takes one argument (the input string)
Inside the function, use slicing to extract the characters of the input string in reverse order

issues.description: The function does not handle non-string inputs.

recommendations: Consider adding input validation to ensure the function only accepts strings.
